targets.rawSql:
WITH span AS (
  SELECT sum(trade_count) AS total_trades,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (max(bucket) - min(bucket) + interval '1 day')) AS total_seconds
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
)
SELECT
  total_trades AS total_trades_decoded,
  (SELECT pg_size_pretty(hypertable_size('trades'))) AS storage_size_compressed,
  (SELECT count(DISTINCT date_trunc('month', bucket)) FROM trades_ohlcv_1d) AS months_covered,
  round((total_trades / total_seconds)::numeric, 0) AS avg_decode_throughput_per_sec
FROM span;

SELECT close AS "Current Price"
FROM trades_ohlcv_1h
ORDER BY bucket DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  min(round(((close - open) / open * 100)::numeric, 2)) AS worst_day_pct,
  max(round(((close - open) / open * 100)::numeric, 2)) AS best_day_pct
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d;

SELECT
  round((695541427.0 * 33 / 1e9)::numeric, 1) AS raw_bin_size_gb,
  15.0 AS compressed_size_gb,
  round((695541427.0 * 33 / 1e9 / 15.0)::numeric, 1) AS compression_ratio_x;

SELECT sum(volume) AS total_volume,
       sum(trade_count) AS total_trades,
       sum(vwap * volume) / sum(volume) AS overall_vwap
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d;

SELECT
  count(*) AS days_with_data,
  (DATE '2025-06-30' - DATE '2025-01-01' + 1) AS expected_days,
  (DATE '2025-06-30' - DATE '2025-01-01' + 1) - count(*) AS missing_days
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d;

panels.title: Data integrity check — real, computable, honest

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  max(cpu_pct) AS peak_cpu_pct,
  round((1e9 / avg(latency_ns))::numeric, 0) AS throughput_ops_per_sec
FROM latency_samples
WHERE decoder_type = 'tick';

WITH r AS (
  SELECT round((((close - lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) / lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS daily_return_pct
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
)
SELECT
  percentile_cont(0.05) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_return_pct) AS var_95_pct,
  percentile_cont(0.01) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY daily_return_pct) AS var_99_pct
FROM r WHERE daily_return_pct IS NOT NULL;

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', bucket), 'Mon YYYY') AS month,
       sum(volume) AS volume
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
GROUP BY 1, date_trunc('month', bucket)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', bucket);

WITH r AS (
  SELECT (close - lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) / lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket) AS ret
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
),
stats AS (SELECT avg(ret) AS mean, stddev(ret) AS sd FROM r WHERE ret IS NOT NULL)
SELECT
  round((avg(power(r.ret - stats.mean, 3)) / power(stats.sd, 3))::numeric, 3) AS skewness,
  round((avg(power(r.ret - stats.mean, 4)) / power(stats.sd, 4) - 3)::numeric, 3) AS excess_kurtosis
FROM r, stats
WHERE r.ret IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY stats.mean, stats.sd;

SELECT bucket AS "time", open, high, low, close 
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT decoder_type,
  percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns) AS p99_latency_ns
FROM latency_samples
GROUP BY decoder_type
ORDER BY p99_latency_ns;

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  sum(volume) OVER (ORDER BY bucket) AS cumulative_volume
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

WITH running_max AS (
  SELECT bucket, close,
    MAX(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS peak
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
  round((((close - peak) / peak) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS drawdown_pct
FROM running_max
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT bucket AS "time", open, high, low, close
FROM trades_ohlcv_1h
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT min(latency_ns) AS lo, max(latency_ns) AS hi
  FROM latency_samples
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    decoder_type,
    latency_ns,
    width_bucket(latency_ns, bounds.lo, bounds.hi + 1, 20) AS bucket_num,
    bounds.lo AS lo,
    bounds.hi AS hi
  FROM latency_samples, bounds
)
SELECT
  round(lo + (bucket_num - 1) * (hi - lo) / 20.0)::bigint AS latency_bucket_ns,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE decoder_type = 'tick')  AS tick,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE decoder_type = 'quote') AS quote,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE decoder_type = 'risk')  AS risk
FROM bucketed
GROUP BY bucket_num, lo, hi
ORDER BY bucket_num;

panels.title: Latency distribution over the benchmark run

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  decoder_type,
  count(*) AS samples,
  round(avg(latency_ns)::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ns,
  round(percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns)::numeric, 0) AS p50_ns,
  round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns)::numeric, 0) AS p95_ns,
  round(percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns)::numeric, 0) AS p99_ns,
  round(avg(cpu_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cpu_pct
FROM latency_samples
GROUP BY decoder_type
ORDER BY avg_latency_ns;

SELECT bucket AS "time", volume
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  round(((close - open) / open * 100)::numeric, 2) AS daily_return_pct
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT bucket, ln(close/lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) AS log_return
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
  round((avg(log_return) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
    / NULLIF(stddev(log_return) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0)
    * sqrt(365))::numeric, 2) AS rolling_sharpe_30d
FROM base
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  extract(hour from bucket)::int AS hour_of_day,
  avg(trade_count) AS avg_trades
FROM trades_ohlcv_1h
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT bucket, close,
    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma20,
    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma50,
    ln(close / lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) AS log_return
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
),
vol AS (
  SELECT bucket, close, ma20, ma50,
    stddev(log_return) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * sqrt(365) AS vol30
  FROM base
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
  CASE
    WHEN vol30 > 0.8 THEN 'High Volatility'
    WHEN ma20 > ma50 THEN 'Uptrend'
    WHEN ma20 < ma50 THEN 'Downtrend'
    ELSE 'Range-bound'
  END AS regime
FROM vol
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  date_trunc('month', bucket) AS month,
  first(open, bucket) AS open,
  max(high) AS high,
  min(low) AS low,
  last(close, bucket) AS close,
  round(((last(close, bucket) - first(open, bucket)) / first(open, bucket) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS change_pct,
  sum(volume) AS volume
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

WITH agg AS (
  SELECT decoder_type, avg(latency_ns) AS avg_ns, count(*) AS samples
  FROM latency_samples
  GROUP BY decoder_type
)
SELECT decoder_type,
  round(avg_ns::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ns,
  round((1e9 / avg_ns)::numeric, 0) AS throughput_ops_per_sec,
  round((max(avg_ns) OVER () / avg_ns)::numeric, 2) AS speedup_vs_slowest_decoder,
  samples
FROM agg
ORDER BY avg_ns;

SELECT bucket::date AS date,
       round(((close-open)/open*100)::numeric,2) AS change_pct,
       volume
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
ORDER BY change_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

panels.title: Extremes (great for a portfolio talking point) Best 5 days:

targets.rawSql:
WITH returns AS (
  SELECT bucket, close,
    ln(close / lag(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket)) AS log_return
  FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
  stddev(log_return) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * sqrt(365) * 100 AS vol_30d,
  stddev(log_return) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 89 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * sqrt(365) * 100 AS vol_90d
FROM returns
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT decoder_type,
  percentile_cont(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns) AS p50_ns,
  percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns) AS p95_ns,
  percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ns) AS p99_ns
FROM latency_samples
GROUP BY decoder_type;

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  close,
  AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_7,
  AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_30
FROM trades_ohlcv_1d
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
ORDER BY 1;
